meta.title: Configure Service Discovery and Network Infrastructure

subtask.role: You are a DevOps Engineer specializing in Kubernetes. Implement subtask 8.2.

context.overview: Set up ClusterIP services, ingress controller, and network policies for secure service communication

requirements.description: Create ClusterIP service manifests for internal service discovery. Configure ingress controller (nginx/traefik) with proper routing rules for external access. Implement network policies to isolate services and control traffic flow between pods. Set up persistent volume claims for stateful components like databases.
